PostToolUse.//: Auto-run ruff format + ruff check on Python files Claude just edited inside services/runtime. Gives Claude immediate lint feedback so it doesn't propose a follow-up change against unformatted code, then watch lefthook reject the commit later. Skip path filtering itself lives in the script.

Auto-regenerate the daemon→client schema pipeline whenever api_schemas.py is touched. Keeps openapi.json + generated.d.ts continuously in sync so Claude's next edit sees up-to-date TS types. Pre-empts the CI drift guard.
